semantic_notes: signal computed at bar close (pandas, identical math to Freqtrade lane strategies); order submitted in on_bar() fills at the venue's next processed bar open (matches Freqtrade's open_date==fill-time semantics)
fixed notional sizing per trade (documented sizing deviation from Freqtrade's compounding 'unlimited' stake mode; bake-off goal is infrastructure comparison, not profit discovery per blueprint)
prices float64 at engine boundary (declared converter loss, same as Freqtrade lane)
profit_total_abs is mark-to-market (ending account value at last close price minus starting balance), not sum of realized_pnl alone, so buy-and-hold (B1) unrealized gains are captured
equity.parquet is a coarse two-point series (start, end), not a full intra-run curve - documented scope simplification

evidence window 2024-01-01..2024-01-14 (bounded subset of the frozen dataset), not full 2021-2026 history - Nautilus's event-driven matching engine has materially higher per-bar/per-order overhead than Freqtrade's vectorized backtest; full-history x 2-pair x 4-strategy x 2-scenario x determinism-rerun replay was infeasible within task budget. Documented scope deviation, not a silent gap.
